question: Which airports do not have departing or arriving flights?
gold_sql: SELECT AirportName FROM Airports WHERE AirportCode NOT IN (SELECT SourceAirport FROM Flights UNION SELECT DestAirport FROM Flights)
gold_sql_original: SELECT AirportName FROM Airports WHERE AirportCode NOT IN (SELECT SourceAirport FROM Flights UNION SELECT DestAirport FROM Flights)
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT AirportName FROM airports WHERE AirportCode NOT IN (SELECT SourceAirport FROM flights UNION SELECT DestAirport FROM flights)
agent_sql: SELECT AirportCode, AirportName, City, Country FROM airports AS a WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM flights AS f WHERE f.SourceAirport = a.AirportCode OR f.DestAirport = a.AirportCode) LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT AirportCode, AirportName, City, Country FROM airports AS a WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM flights AS f WHERE f.SourceAirport = a.AirportCode OR f.DestAirport = a.AirportCode) LIMIT 100
